name: No model routing in bin/opk
description: bin/opk must not contain model discovery, routing, or benchmark commands

name: No API keys in templates
description: Template files must not contain API key references

name: .gitignore allows .opencode/
description: .gitignore must not block .opencode/ directory

name: No model routing scripts exist
description: Deleted model scripts must not exist

name: Safety plugin uses correct pattern
description: test-safety-plugin.mjs must pass

name: Permission ordering correct
description: test-permission-rules.py must pass — wildcard before deny

name: No model override template
description: opencode.models.example.jsonc must not exist

name: Model-agnostic policy documented
description: docs/MODEL_ROUTING.md must exist and contain model-agnostic language

name: Model status via opk CLI
description: bin/opk model status must run and output model-agnostic policy

name: No model override in agent files
description: Agent .md files must not contain model: override lines

name: Writer/read-only reviewer policy
description: build-strong must define reviewer as read-only

name: build-strong pipeline stages
description: build-strong must define all 7 pipeline stages

name: Timeout helper exists and runs
description: scripts/timeout.sh must exist and run without error

name: Timeout helper exits 124 on timeout
description: scripts/timeout.sh must return exit code 124 when command exceeds timeout

name: Timeout helper passes through exit code
description: scripts/timeout.sh must pass through command exit code when not timed out

name: backend-route-review exists
description: backend-route-review.md must exist

name: model-route-review deleted
description: model-route-review.md must not exist

name: No model routing commands in backend-route-review
description: backend-route-review.md must not contain model routing commands

name: README agent count accurate
description: README.md must show 16 active agents, not 49

name: README command count accurate
description: README.md must show 71 commands, not 66

name: No Quality Scorecard in README
description: README.md must not contain Quality Scorecard with 10/10 scores

name: UPSTREAM_CAPABILITY_MAP has correct URLs and pins
description: UPSTREAM_CAPABILITY_MAP.md must have correct repo URLs and version pins for all upstreams

name: Default timeout path returns 124
description: GNU/system timeout must return exit code 124 without OPK_TIMEOUT_FORCE_FALLBACK

name: Timeout kills grandchild processes
description: Timeout must kill all child/grandchild processes on timeout, not just the direct child
command: bash -c 'MARKER=$(mktemp); setsid sh -c "sleep 19876 & echo \$! > $MARKER; wait" & SPID=$!; sleep 0.5; GRANDPID=$(cat $MARKER 2>/dev/null); rm -f $MARKER; kill -9 -- -$SPID 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; if kill -0 $GRANDPID 2>/dev/null; then kill -9 $GRANDPID 2>/dev/null; exit 1; else exit 0; fi'

name: Default timeout path preserves exit code
description: GNU/system timeout must preserve command exit code when command completes before timeout

name: install-gsd-core.sh status runs without unbound variable error
description: install-gsd-core.sh status must not fail with unbound variable under set -u

name: THIRD_PARTY.md has correct upstream references
description: THIRD_PARTY.md must reference correct version pins and upstream repos
